title: Google Patents Details Scraper
description: Fetch full Google Patents metadata for one or more publication IDs or Google Patents URLs.

patent_id.title: Patent ID
patent_id.description: Single patent publication ID or full Google Patents ID, such as US9789384B1 or patent/US9789384B1/en.

patent_ids.title: Patent IDs
patent_ids.description: Batch of patent publication IDs. Each item can be a short publication ID or a full Google Patents ID.

url.title: Google Patents URL
url.description: Single Google Patents URL, such as https://patents.google.com/patent/US9789384B1.

urls.title: Google Patents URLs
urls.description: Batch of Google Patents URLs to enrich in the same Apify run.
